//notes: these pouches come in left- and right-hand configurations, and are generally sold in complementary pairs throughout different manufacturer stores
we model them as orientation-agnostic, for ease of inventory management
description: A side pouch for a plate carrier or a ballistic vest.  Allows storing a bit extra stuff, up to and including a rifle magazine.  Can attach to vests with hook-and-loop mounts.

variants.description: A side pouch for a plate carrier or a ballistic vest.  Attaches to hook-and-loop surfaces under the cummerbund flap, allowing the wearer to take on a little more stuff, including rifle magazines.  <variant:multicam>

A side pouch for a plate carrier or a ballistic vest.  Attaches to hook-and-loop surfaces under the cummerbund flap, allowing the wearer to take on a little more stuff, including rifle magazines.  <variant:black>

A side pouch for a plate carrier or a ballistic vest.  Attaches to hook-and-loop surfaces under the cummerbund flap, allowing the wearer to take on a little more stuff, including rifle magazines.  <variant:white>

pocket_data.//max_item_length: length of STANAG 40-round magazine w/ ranger plate

description: A thin plastic plate with a set of screw holes and a hook-and-loop exterior.  Can hold a Kydex knife sheath or a single-slot MOLLE pouch, in order to carry a knife on the side of a plate carrier or ballistic vest.  Can attach to vests with hook-and-loop mounts.

name.str: Ferro Concepts hook-and-loop sheath side mount

variants.description: A thin elongated plastic fold with a set of screw holes and a hook-and-loop exterior.  Can hold a single Kydex knife sheath or a single-slot MOLLE pouch, to be worn on a plate carrier or a ballistic vest.  Attaches to hook-and-loop surfaces.  Can be worn underneath other hook-and-loop equipment.  <variant:black>

name.str: Ferro Concepts hook-and-loop sheath side mount

variants.description: A thin elongated plastic fold with a set of screw holes and a hook-and-loop exterior.  Can hold a single Kydex knife sheath or a single-slot MOLLE pouch, to be worn on a plate carrier or a ballistic vest.  Attaches to hook-and-loop surfaces.  Worn as a side pouch.  <variant:coyote>

notes: length and width acquired from visual reference
